synth_pad_wash: a washed out ambient synthesizer pad
a soft sustained electronic synth wash
supersaw_stack: a wide detuned saw wave synthesizer
a dense bright electronic saw pad
digital_synth_lead: a sharp melodic electronic synthesizer lead
bitcrushed_synth_lead: a crunchy low resolution electronic synthesizer
an aliased distorted digital synth lead
granular_texture: a smeared resampled granular synthesizer sound
wavetable_noise: a harsh digital synth noise texture
a synthetic noisy evolving electronic texture
fuzzy_lofi_synth: a gritty saturated electronic synth texture
a warm distorted DIY synth sound
vocal_synth_hybrid: a sound between a vocal chop and a synth
formant_vocoder: a formant shifted synthetic vocal sound

sidechained_synth_bass: a pumping bass synth ducked by the kick

not_synth_vocal: a vocal phrase without a synthesizer
not_synth_guitar: a guitar sound without a synthesizer
not_synth_drums: a rhythm drum loop without a synthesizer
